title: Independent school inspection: toolkit, operating guides and information
body: "Find guidance for non-association independent school inspections in England:    non-association independent school inspection toolkit – what inspectors and schools use to discuss the quality of provision on inspection  non-association independent school inspection operating guide – a step-by-step guide for inspectors on how to inspect a school  information about non-association independent school inspections – for school staff and leaders, parents and carers and the wider public  non-association independent school additional inspections operating guide – guidance for inspectors on how to carry out additional inspections of independent schools    This guidance will replace the independent schools inspection handbook and the independent schools additional inspection handbook from January 2026.   Education inspection framework  The education inspection framework explains why we inspect non-association independent schools (and other educational provision), including the legal requirements. "
